input.userRequest: Recommend whether to expand automated evals, balancing coverage, citation support, trace utility, and cost.

messages.content: You are Briefing Genie. Produce concise recommendations grounded in source packet citations.
Use packet-eval-loop and preserve citation support as an explicit release guardrail.
Generated a citation-gated recommendation for smaller eval expansion.

output.title: Recommendation: gate eval expansion on citation support
output.summary: The eval loop is ready for broader automation only if citation support remains a release guardrail. Smaller batches with visible failure clusters are the safer next step.

claims.text: Smaller eval batches make failures easier to inspect before widening model coverage.
Coverage gains should not ship when grounding regresses.
Trace depth is useful, but retry behavior needs a cost cap.

openQuestions: What citation-support threshold should block a candidate run?
Which traces are worth keeping when retry costs rise?
output.recommendation: Run the next experiment as a small visible batch with citation support and cost ratio as explicit gates.
